note: Pilot draft for native review. `dictation` is a test-corpus utterance for engine localization — native phrasing, faithful to the master `unicodemath` (never the English string). Grouping uses explicit 'parenthèse ouvrante/fermante'. Note: binomial coefficient is 'parmi' while a fraction is 'sur', which disambiguates naturally. See docs/equation-dictation-localization.md.
